item.name: Google Cloud Monitoring List Time Series

request.name: Google Cloud Monitoring List Time Series

description.content: Lists time series that match a filter.

query.description: Monitoring filter specifying the time series to return.

item.name: Google Cloud Monitoring Create Time Series

request.name: Google Cloud Monitoring Create Time Series

description.content: Creates or adds data to one or more time series.

item.name: Google Cloud Monitoring List Alert Policies

request.name: Google Cloud Monitoring List Alert Policies

description.content: Lists the existing alerting policies for the project.

request.name: Google Cloud Monitoring Create Alert Policy

request.name: Google Cloud Monitoring Get Alert Policy

item.name: Google Cloud Monitoring Update Alert Policy

item.name: Google Cloud Monitoring List Uptime Check Configs

request.name: Google Cloud Monitoring List Uptime Check Configs

description.content: Lists the existing uptime check configurations.

item.name: Google Cloud Monitoring Create Uptime Check Config

request.name: Google Cloud Monitoring Create Uptime Check Config

description.content: Creates a new uptime check configuration.

item.name: Google Cloud Monitoring List Notification Channels

request.name: Google Cloud Monitoring List Notification Channels

description.content: Lists the notification channels for the project.

item.name: Google Cloud Monitoring List Metric Descriptors

request.name: Google Cloud Monitoring List Metric Descriptors

description.content: Lists metric descriptors that match a filter.

item.name: Google Cloud Monitoring Create Metric Descriptor

request.name: Google Cloud Monitoring Create Metric Descriptor

description.content: Creates a new metric descriptor for custom metrics.
Lists the existing groups for the project.

The Cloud Monitoring API provides programmatic access to time series data, alert policies, notification channels, uptime checks, dashboards, metric descriptors, monitored resource descriptors, and service level objectives for comprehensive infrastructure and application monitoring.
